purpose: Record the Gap A plateau: localized obstruction, surviving source-shell lift signal, no uniform upstairs rule, and no closure.
boundary: This does not close Gap A.
This records the active source-shell lift conjecture.
No uniform upstairs source-shell rule has been found.
No source-native projection-family generator has been derived.
Mode 2 mirror remains projection-level evidence and is not promoted here.

plateau.short_form: Gap A remains open with a localized interior seam obstruction and a surviving source-shell lift conjecture.
keeper_lines: The seam does not close in the projection rows.
It lifts into the source shell.
The source shell does not yet speak one uniform upstairs law.
Source-shell lift is a conjecture, not closure.
plain_english: The simple local WXYZTI register generator was not found.
The outer frame stabilizes across cycles.
The interior turn seam remains the obstruction.
The obstructed seams have unique length-2 source-shell correction paths.
Those correction paths do not share a uniform source-side label or shift law.
Therefore the current evidence supports a conjectural upstairs lift, not a closed theorem.

conjecture.name: Source-Shell Lift Conjecture for Gap A
conjecture.statement: The single WXYZTI projection does not close its interior turn seam. The obstruction lifts to a local source-neighbor shell, where every interior mismatch has a unique length-2 source-slot correction path. However, the current data do not exhibit a uniform upstairs source-shell rule, so this remains a conjecture rather than closure.
evidence_for: Outer frame roles WX, XY, and IW stabilize across cycles.
Interior turn roles YZ, ZT, and TI localize the obstruction.
All four interior mismatches are unique shortest correction paths.
All four interior mismatches are covered by local source shell radius 1.
evidence_against_closure: Neighbor projection rows do not cover all corrections.
Projection rows do not cover all corrections.
Only one correction path is support-internal.
No uniform candidate0 or candidate1 label signature exists.
No uniform candidate0 or candidate1 shift signature exists.
No source-native projection-family generator has been derived.

closed_branches.detail: Rows are not all path-like; non-path rows remain.
No source-native column-hypergraph register generator was found.
All 18 rows were selected exactly, but the family was singleton-heavy and feature-heavy.
IW rows were salvaged as reusable non-lookup subgrammar; selector family was not promoted.
No strict station-variable generator was found.
Outer frame stabilized; obstruction localized to the interior turn seam.
All four interior mismatches have short source-slot correction paths.
All correction paths are unique length-2 paths, but uniform law did not survive.

closed_branches.result: partial row cover; full source-shell cover
closed_branches.detail: Neighbor projection rows cover only part of the corrections; source shell radius 1 covers all.

closed_branches.result: source-shell signal survives; no uniform upstairs rule
closed_branches.detail: Source-shell lift signal survives, but no uniform label or shift rule was found.

blocked_promotions: Do not call Gap A closed.
Do not call the exact selector family a generator.
Do not call the correction paths a source-native seam law.
Do not call source-shell coverage upstairs closure.
Do not promote Mode 2 mirror to source law.
allowed_next_work: Treat source-shell lift as an explicit conjecture.
Search for a richer source-native projection-family generator later.
Use the stable outer frame as partial register structure.
Use the interior turn seam as the next target.
Use this record as the plateau boundary for the current Gap A branch.

interpretation.main_result: Gap A remains open, but now with a precise source-shell lift conjecture.
interpretation.what_we_learned: The obstruction is not global confusion; it is localized at the interior turn seam and source-shell reachable.
interpretation.why_not_closure: Source-shell reachability is weaker than a source-native register generator.
interpretation.why_this_is_useful: The next search can target a projection-family/source-shell generator instead of refighting local selectors.
interpretation.next_move: Stop this branch as an open plateau, or begin a new branch dedicated to source-shell projection-family generation.

claim.short_form: Gap A remains open with a localized interior seam obstruction and a surviving source-shell lift conjecture.
claim.not_closed_reason: Source-shell reachability is weaker than a source-native register generator.
claim.next_problem: Stop this branch as an open plateau, or begin a new branch dedicated to source-shell projection-family generation.
